violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The hand-washing sink in the bar area was blocked by chemical spray bottles located in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Spray bottles were removed from hand sink during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Molluscan Shellfish (little neck clams) located in the prep unit did not have the proper identification tags. Molluscan Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the Molluscan Shellstock are received until the container is empty. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled with the name of chemicals during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
